name: io.github.Servosity/domotz-mcp
title: Domotz MCP
description: Every Domotz endpoint, plus a local SQLite fleet mirror that answers cross-site questions.

environmentVariables.name: DOMOTZ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Set the DOMOTZ_API_KEY credential for the Domotz MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: DOMOTZ_REGION
environmentVariables.description: Selects the Domotz API cell for your portal (default us-east-1-cell-1).
